name: llm-code-auditor
description: Detect and fix likely LLM-generated code smells and over-engineered agent code.

interface.shortDescription: Detect and fix AI-generated code smells
interface.longDescription: Audit generated or agent-written code for high-confidence LLM patterns such as single-use abstractions, naming inflation, utility dumping, pass-through layers, speculative extensibility, narration comments, hallucinated APIs, missing edge cases, and context-insensitive refactors.
defaultPrompt: Audit this code for LLM-generated patterns.
